commands.review_summary:
The PR updates MEDIA parsing, streaming directive tail buffering, shared Markdown fence scanning, and focused tests so MEDIA-looking lines in indented code or invalid fences are preserved as text instead of attachments.

PR surface: Source +78, Tests +288. Total +366 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows only fenced code is skipped before line.trimStart() checks MEDIA, so a 4-space or tab indented MEDIA line outside a fence can be extracted; I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
